title: NatalResponse
description: Successful response contract for POST /calculate/bazi/natal. Per-pillar hidden stems (ruleset identities, DECISION-003 Qi-role weights — the same source /calculate/wuxing computes from), Ten Gods relative to the day master for every pillar stem and hidden stem, and the month command (Yue Ling). Deliberately ABSENT (unsourced in the engine, never fabricated): a seasonal-strength assessment of the month command (Wang/Xiang/Xiu/Qiu/Si), day_master_strength, yong_shen, and any rooting (tong gen) derivation — all pending domain-reviewed tables (MISSING-003). Element labels use the English lowercase vocabulary of /calculate/bazi/dayun. Error responses are described by natal.error.schema.json. TODO: replace `$id` host before production release.

StemEnum.description: Ten Heavenly Stems in Pinyin. Note: stem `Wu` (戊, yang earth) is spelt identically to branch `Wu` (午, horse) — different characters, different fields, no contract collision.

BranchEnum.description: Twelve Earthly Branches in Pinyin. See StemEnum for the Wu/Wu spelling collision note.

TenGodNameEnum.description: Ten-God label in the ruleset `ten_gods.relation_to_god` vocabulary (spec/rulesets/standard_bazi_2026.json).

TenGodPinyinEnum.description: Canonical ten Shen (Ten Gods) in Pinyin with a space between syllables — the same vocabulary as the dayun endpoint's TenGodEnum.

ElementRelationEnum.description: Five-element relation of the target stem to the day master — same vocabulary as the dayun endpoint's relation_to_day_master.

name.description: Ruleset Ten-God label for this stem relative to the day master (e.g. 'SevenKilling').

label_de.description: Short German label of the relation (e.g. 'Druck / Struktur').

qi.description: Qi role of the hidden stem, in the ruleset `hidden_stems_weighting.role_weights` vocabulary (principal = main Qi, central = middle Qi, residual = residual Qi).

weight.description: Qi-role weight (DECISION-003: bound to the same table /calculate/wuxing computes from — principal 1.0, central 0.5, residual 0.3).

ten_god.description: Ten God of this hidden stem relative to the day master. Present for every hidden stem, including hidden stems of the day branch.

branch_element.description: Element of the branch's principal hidden stem — the identical derivation MonthCommand.element uses for the month branch.

polarity.description: Yin/yang polarity of the pillar's heavenly stem.

ten_god.description: Ten God of this pillar's visible stem relative to the day master. Null for the day pillar (the day stem IS the day master).

hidden_stems.description: The branch's hidden stems in Qi order (principal, then central, then residual, as far as the branch has them).

MonthCommand.description: Month command (Yue Ling) — deterministic ruleset facts only: the month branch and its principal hidden (Qi) stem. Deliberately NO seasonal-strength assessment (Wang/Xiang/Xiu/Qiu/Si): that needs domain-reviewed tables still pending as MISSING-003 and is never fabricated.

branch_index.description: Branch index in constants.BRANCHES order (Zi=0 .. Hai=11).

element.description: Element of the principal Qi stem.

source_status.description: Honesty marker (match.types.SourceStatus): these facts are deterministic ruleset lookups.

ruleset_id.description: BaZi ruleset that supplied hidden stems, Ten-God table and weights (e.g. 'standard_bazi_2026').

provisional_fields.description: ['hour'] when birth_time_known=false — the hour pillar (and its Ten Gods / hidden stems) is provisional.

warnings.description: Stable warning codes (match.types.WarningCode), matched by code, never by prose.
